text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm on my way to the track for training, when...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hup... Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Uuugh, I can't reach it...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heya, Rice! What's got you jumping around?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh, Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Um, my handkerchief flew off in the wind, and
now it's caught on a tree branch.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I getcha. Thought you were getting some
jump rope practice in or something.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But I haven't had much luck jumping... I'd be able
to reach if only I were a little taller...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Now, listen here! The Rice I know isn't someone
who whines about her size.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I've had my eye on you, pardner... You kept on
losing, yet you still continued to race.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're always facing your goals head-on! That
unwavering persistence of yours is a strength!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Don't give up! Jump and grab that handkerchief!
Grab your dreams!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Yes... You're right! I'm gonna keep at it no matter
what!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower jumps with all her might, over and
over again, until finally...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I got it?! I did it! I got the handkerchief!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Wow, that was impressive! Congrats!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: I'm so happy for you, Rice!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Hweh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the blink of an eye, a crowd assembles to
shower Rice Shower in praise.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya think, Rice? Your efforts have touched
everyone here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The will to not give up... The courage to keep
fighting! You're the best Umamusume the world's
ever seen!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe... I'm not sure what you mean, but if
everyone's happy, I guess I am too.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now, I'll take that handkerchief off ya!
I'm tacking on an extra fifty centimeters for your
next challenge!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Whaa?! But it took me ages just to get it once!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The importance of continuing to strive toward
your goals... It's a message that works just as well
for trainers.
